title: Coding agent installed a typosquatted package mid-task
description: During an autonomous refactor the coding agent resolved a dependency to a typosquatted, malicious package from the public registry. The package was unsigned and unpinned and shipped a backdoored build step. This is an agentic supply-chain compromise: a poisoned, attacker-controlled artifact was loaded by the agent with no hash or provenance check.
observation: Outbound connection to an unknown host fired during the package's post-install script.
